- tightly utilize/couple/integrate the latest advanced openspec paradigms

`linkedin-profile-exporter` should offer easy ways to extract all available linkedin profile data from the profile on the current page in browser. the last known working version (before manifest bug) was `[joshuatz/linkedin-to-jsonresume](https://github.com/joshuatz/linkedin-to-jsonresume)` (w/ last extension build @/Users/ww/Downloads/build_3.2.3/). 

- offer a suite of browser extensions to 
  - uses wxt framework (https://wxt.dev/llms.txt) to support all browser variants (eg mobile safari or chrome)
  - react + typescript + shadcn-ui/tailwindcssv4 + zod + Zustand + Sonner + Motion + monaspice font variants + vitest + playwright + @tanstack/react-query
  - include a robust, modern, sleek, feature-rich settings panel
  - make it as intelligent, user-friendly, customizable, and fully automated as possible
- bookmarklet exporter

- export as:
  - JSON (an improved JSONRESUME data model)
  - YAML (an improved YAMLRESUME data model (https://github.com/yamlresume/yamlresume))
  - CSV
  - PDF
  - XML
  - Markdown

- other parts of the stack
  - github actions ci/cd
  - pre-commit
  - conventional + atomic commits
  - fumadocs (fully extended + configured) docs site (w/ shadcn-ui & tailwind @latest) (fully SEO optimized)
  - justfile
  - DESIGN.md design system (per the related specification)
  - media assets
    - sleek, modern, simple, elegant, iconic img generator tool generated project icon (transparent bg & no text/letters/font/words in the final icon/logo/img)
    - social preview img (eg github social preview or twitter card etc)

- web store postings management
  - listing, content, images/screenshots, etc for each web store
the project schema should synthesize all of JSONRESUME, YAMLRESUME, and other possible fields
